solicitation_notes: NIH Request for Applications using the R01 mechanism with an RFA-specific shorter Research Strategy page limit (6 pages) and one program-specific supplement (Milestones and Timeline). All other R01 application requirements remain unchanged per the RFA.

document_requirements.label: Research Strategy
document_requirements.description: Main technical body of the NIH application. The RFA shortens the R01 default page limit from 12 pages to 6 pages to reflect the exploratory scope. All other Research Strategy requirements, including Significance / Innovation / Approach subsections and embedded Preliminary Studies, are unchanged.
document_requirements.format_spec: Required subsection headings: Significance, Innovation, Approach. Extensive Preliminary Studies are not expected under this RFA.
document_requirements.source_excerpt: The Research Strategy is limited to 6 pages, reflecting the exploratory scope of this RFA. Applicants should prioritize a well-defined hypothesis and a focused Approach; extensive Preliminary Studies are not expected.

document_requirements.label: Milestones and Timeline
document_requirements.description: Required RFA-specific supplement describing quantitative milestones for each Specific Aim, expected completion dates by quarter, go / no-go decision points, and contingency plans for missed milestones. Uploaded in the 'Other Attachments' slot and separate from the Research Strategy page limit.
document_requirements.format_spec: Maximum 2 pages. Must address milestones by aim, quarterly completion dates, go/no-go decision points, and contingency plans.
document_requirements.source_excerpt: All applications must include a Milestones and Timeline supplement of no more than 2 pages describing quantitative milestones for each Specific Aim, expected completion dates by quarter, go / no-go decision points, and contingency plans for milestones that are not met.
